definition: A fundamental concept in Agentic AI under Model Adaptation, representing Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning.
simple_explanation: Think of Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning as an essential building block of Agentic AI. It is commonly used within Model Adaptation.
technical_explanation: In production Agentic AI systems, Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning plays a key role within Model Adaptation. Engineering implementations must account for scaling constraints and design trade-offs.
